name: Creamy Scrambled Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the vegetable stock to a boil in a large skillet.
2. Add the potatoes, pepper, and green onions. Reduce heat and simmer until the potatoes are tender.
3. Add the tofu and cook until heated through. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. In a bowl, stir together the remaining ingredients: miso paste, water, and turmeric.
5. Stir this mixture into the potato mixture and serve immediately, garnished with parsley.
